response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished senior engineer with 11+ years of software development experience and some C programming background, this role has a critical blocker: native-level Japanese language proficiency is a required qualification, and the resume shows no Japanese language skills. Additionally, the role demands deep expertise in embedded networking security, Linux kernel analysis, and firmware development—areas entirely absent from his background. His recent career (2018-present) has focused on web/full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS), moving away from systems-level C programming and embedded work. The C experience listed is from 2014-2015 and his expertise lies in web platforms, data integration, and developer tooling, not security features for LAN-switch products.
strengths: 11+ years as a senior/staff engineer demonstrates strong fundamentals and ability to master complex systems
Proficient in C programming and has worked with Linux; understands systems-level concepts from microservices and DevOps background
Proven polyglot programmer who has successfully learned diverse tech stacks and contributed across multiple domains
concerns: Resume shows zero Japanese language proficiency; native-level Japanese is a required qualification for this role
No demonstrated experience with embedded systems, firmware, networking, or security engineering; career entirely in web/full-stack domain
Most recent systems-level C work was 11 years ago; current focus is TypeScript/Node.js web development, moving away from embedded/kernel work

key_factors.factor: Career trajectory away from systems programming
